description: Grey and green rucksackTwo adjustable, heavily padded shoulder straps with sternum straps secured with a click clasp, a padded strap for added support around your waist secured with a click claspOne main compartment with toggle clasp, has an internal pocket with a flap closure with removable metal insert for better support, a flap with click clasp, a zipnbsp;pocket, adjustable straps on top to cover the main compartment openingOne external zip pocket on either sideOne external zip pocket on the frontOne zip pocketnbsp;on the bottom to store the attached elasticated rain coverPadded back and firm support at the back for support for heavy loadWarranty: 5 years from the date of purchase against manufacturing defectsDisclaimer: Please note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shownNote: Thenbsp;innernbsp;liningnbsp;material/colour may vary from what is shown in the imageWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
